stage: Resource Scheduler & Quota Arbitration — Design & Protocol Definition

compliance_entries.description: All scheduling decisions MUST be observable — resource matching returns SchedulingDecision with reason
compliance_entries.design_element: IResourceScheduler.match_resources() returns SchedulingDecision; all decisions carry status, reason, and timestamp

compliance_entries.description: Quota usage observable via QuotaUsage dataclass
compliance_entries.design_element: IQuotaArbitrator methods return QuotaUsage with percentage, cpu_used, mem_used; measurable and reportable

compliance_entries.description: Starvation is observable via StarvationReport
compliance_entries.design_element: IFairnessEngine.detect_starvation() returns StarvationReport with wait_time, priority, boost_applied, action_taken

compliance_entries.description: Resources MUST be distributed fairly — fair share computation
compliance_entries.design_element: IFairnessEngine.compute_fair_share() divides total resources by active executions; imbalance_ratio tracks deviation

compliance_entries.description: Starvation prevention — priority boost and fallback recovery
compliance_entries.design_element: 5-tier boost map (BATCH→LOW→NORMAL→HIGH); fallback worker on repeated starvation; thresholds per priority tier

compliance_entries.description: Load balancing across workers via imbalance_ratio sorting
compliance_entries.design_element: IFairnessEngine.balance_load() sorts offers by imbalance_ratio ascending; least-loaded worker scheduled first

compliance_entries.description: Resource limits MUST be enforced — soft and hard limits
compliance_entries.design_element: QuotaPolicy with soft_limit (warning) and hard_limit (rejection); IQuotaArbitrator.enforce_limit() rejects at hard_limit

compliance_entries.description: Three-tier quota enforcement: execution, worker, global
compliance_entries.design_element: QuotaType enum (EXECUTION/WORKER/GLOBAL); QuotaPool tracks per-scope reservation; cooldown on hard limit hit

compliance_entries.description: No global mutable state — all F3 components are per-instance
compliance_entries.design_element: IResourceScheduler, IQuotaArbitrator, IFairnessEngine, ITopologyMapper are instance Protocols; state via QuotaPool (per-instance)

compliance_entries.description: Quota pool state is recoverable - refund_on_failure reverses consumption
compliance_entries.design_element: IQuotaArbitrator.refund_on_failure() restores quota after execution failure; prevents resource leak

compliance_entries.description: Determinism — same request + offers → same scheduling decision
compliance_entries.design_element: Resource matching algorithm is pure (score computation, filtering, tie-breaking); no randomness

compliance_entries.description: Reversibility — resource consumption is reversible via refund
compliance_entries.design_element: refund_on_failure() reverses consume_usage(); soft reservation TTL auto-releases; preemption re-queues with boost

compliance_entries.description: Recoverability — preemption requires checkpoint; failed executions refund quota
compliance_entries.design_element: Preemption Guard 3 requires checkpoint_available; refund_on_failure for failed executions; starvation boost for queued

compliance_entries.description: Terminal states — REJECT is terminal; no transition out
compliance_entries.design_element: REJECT state in allocation machine has no outgoing transitions; once rejected, execution must resubmit

compliance_entries.description: Idempotency — all scheduling operations are idempotent
compliance_entries.design_element: assign_worker: already assigned → return existing; preempt_if_needed: already preempted → return existing; consume_usage: dedup by execution_id

compliance_entries.description: Preemption guards prevent unfair preemption
compliance_entries.design_element: 4 preemption guards: priority gate (diff >= 2 tiers), age threshold (60s), checkpoint available, worker cooldown

compliance_entries.description: Integration with F2 Control Plane for worker offers and scaling
compliance_entries.design_element: F2 ControlPlane.publish_state() feeds worker offers to F3; F2 Autoscaler triggers quota pool adjustments; F2 drain notifies F3 resource release

compliance_entries.description: Integration with F1 UnifiedRuntime for submission and observation
compliance_entries.design_element: F1.submit() triggers ResourceRequest creation; F1.observe() reports resource metrics; ExecutionOptions.priority maps to PriorityTier

compliance_entries.description: Topology constraints validated before assignment
compliance_entries.design_element: ITopologyMapper.validate_constraints() returns violation list; empty = all satisfied; fallback relaxes constraints

compliance_entries.description: Priority boost on starvation follows defined rules; no infinite boost
compliance_entries.design_element: Priority boost has 5-tier ceiling (CRITICAL max); HIGH and CRITICAL not boosted; boost applied once per starvation event
